situational_context: Early rebuild phase from prolonged detraining (chronic load 18.8, ~1.2% of 2023 peak). First structured session logged Apr 18 (Zwift Z2, load 15). Pattern shifting from commute-only to commute + structured training. Infant cohabitant continues to fragment sleep (78-min waking last night). Readiness consistently 'high' — autonomic system supports load increase. Two 'sur site' days this week (Tue/Thu) constrain training windows. Weight trending down slightly (106.9 → 105.9 over 3 days).

recommendations.text: Execute tonight's Zwift Z2 session (35 min, HR 125-135). First back-to-back structured week is the critical habit trigger for rebuild.
recommendations.measurable: Session logged on Strava by end of day with training load >=12

recommendations.text: Prioritise sleep recovery tonight — last night's 5.95h was the week's lowest, driven by 78-min baby waking. Target lights-out by 22:00.
Wednesday's run is the first since prolonged layoff. Keep pace conversational (HR < 130) and accept walk breaks if needed to stay in zone.
recommendations.measurable: Run completed with avg HR < 130 and no musculoskeletal complaints

markers_to_watch.threshold: Sustaining > 35 ms confirms recovery capacity; drop below 32 would signal overreach or external stressor
markers_to_watch.reason: Slight downtrend this week (38 → 37) — monitor for reversal post first structured week
